name: Western Union
description_short: Dallas, TX Western Union at 9500 Forest Ln offers 24/7 check cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
The Western Union location at 9500 Forest Ln in Dallas, TX is a standalone facility open 24 hours daily, providing convenient access to money transfer and check-cashing services for Dallas residents. This Forest Lane location operates around the clock to serve customers whenever they need to send money, receive transfers, or cash checks.

This Dallas Western Union branch offers reliable money transfer services, bill payment options, and check cashing to the local community. Contact the Forest Ln location at +1 214-341-1163 to ask about specific transfer options, fees, or to confirm service availability. The staff can assist with domestic and international transfers during your visit.

For Dallas residents needing quick access to money services, this Forest Lane location is conveniently situated with 24/7 availability, making it useful whether you're transferring money to family or need to cash a check on a weekend or late night. Bring a valid photo ID to complete any transaction. Western Union is a trusted name in global money transfer with thousands of locations worldwide.
pros: Extensive physical network with 150+ US agent locations offering convenient cash pickup
24/7 online money transfer initiation through WU.com with in-store payment options
Extended hours at many locations (open until 8-11 PM), accommodating working customers
Multilingual platform support in 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, and Chinese
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger) for accessibility
Real-time transfer tracking and multiple payment method options
Western Union Rewards loyalty program with referral incentives
cons: No fee, exchange rate, or delivery timeframe information disclosed on the location-finder page, making cost comparison impossible
Service availability limited by retail agent operating hours rather than dedicated branches
Temporary service disruptions (Orange Wallet unavailability noted on current site)
No traditional banking services—strictly money movement intermediary
One location (Circle K #0682 in Leadville) offers only money orders, not full transfer services
best_for: Immigrants and international workers needing to send money to family overseas
Unbanked and underbanked consumers without traditional checking accounts
Consumers seeking after-hours cash access through retail locations
Customers who prefer in-person transactions over purely digital money transfer services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for immigrants, international workers, and unbanked consumers who need reliable in-person money movement services with extended retail hours and multilingual support. Primary caveat: the website does not transparently display fees or exchange rates, so customers must contact individual locations or use the online calculator to understand true costs before committing to transfers.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 through WU.com)
In-store cash pickup at agent locations
International money transfer with currency exchange
Mobile top-up for international phone accounts
meta_description: Western Union at 9500 Forest Ln, Dallas, TX. Open 24/7 for money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing.
